scripts.build:offline: BRANDMASTER_STATIC_EXPORT=true next build && node scripts/generate-service-worker.mjs out
scripts.build:pages:corporate: BRANDMASTER_GITHUB_PAGES=true next build && node scripts/generate-service-worker.mjs out /bmeshesha/Brandmaster
scripts.build:pages:public: BRANDMASTER_GITHUB_PAGES=true BRANDMASTER_PAGES_BASE_PATH=/Brandmaster next build && node scripts/generate-service-worker.mjs out /Brandmaster
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:pages:corporate && node scripts/publish-pages.mjs origin
scripts.deploy:pages:public: npm run build:pages:public && node scripts/publish-pages.mjs github
scripts.deploy:analytics: npm run analytics:snapshot && npm run deploy:pages && npm run deploy:pages:public
